thread_title: New player. Team an character questions

content:
TL;DR I’d say get Tulu and focus on the Aequor realm (can get Tulu from the general banner). Will help you get through the rest of the game. 

Early game is easy, events are challenging but fair, and the late game is known to be pretty difficult. 

Also, I’d recommend to check out the tier list for more information: https://discord.com/channels/1131791637933199470/1329362854721224704/1329362854721224704
thread_title: New player. Team an character questions

content:
Hi there, a newish player here. I’m kinda experienced with the game, but I’ll be basing it off from what I heard. If you want more advice, I’d say ask questions in the English chat, they’re more experienced than me.

Aequors are pretty good, especially with realm mixing. Tentacles provides a good source of damage, especially with the tidal waves. It also provides some good defense as well with silent sea. 

Also, you can get an item from the store that allows you to enlighten the character you got already. 

As for card wheels, go with Giant’s Blade, it has a chance to reduce all user’s hand card cost by 1 and provides extra critical damage after exalt. Also, when you get a SSR wheel to 12, you can pair it with others SSR wheel.
thread_title: New player. Team an character questions
